allow: Bash(python -c "from django.conf import settings; import django; django.setup\(\); print\('STATIC_URL:', settings.STATIC_URL\); print\('DEBUG:', settings.DEBUG\); print\('STATICFILES_DIRS:', getattr\(settings, 'STATICFILES_DIRS', 'not set'\)\)")
Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from django.conf import settings; print\('STATIC_URL:', settings.STATIC_URL\); print\('DEBUG:', settings.DEBUG\)")
